response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performance where characters Kobo Kanaeru and Mori Calliope interact, dance, and perform a cover of the song "Maru Maru Mori Mori!". The video consists of dialogue, the main singing performance, and post-performance interaction.

scenes.description: Conversational dialogue between Kobo Kanaeru and Mori Calliope with no music.
The characters perform a synchronized dance while singing "Maru Maru Mori Mori!". Title/credits are visible on-screen.
scenes.song_title: マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ (Maru Maru Mori Mori!)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ みんな食べるよ
ツル・ツル・テカ・テカ 明日も晴れるかな
ダバデュア ダバジャバ 忘れ物するなよ
ダバデュア ダバジャバ デュア 大きくなったら
お空に声が届くかな？
マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ チャレンジするよ
ツル・ツル・テカ・テカ 明日も晴れるかな
頑張って走っても つまずくことあるけれど
信じていれば大丈夫。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Maru Maru Mori Mori, everyone eat up
Tsuru Tsuru Teka Teka, I wonder if it will be sunny tomorrow
Daba Dua Daba Jaba, don't forget anything
Daba Dua Daba Jaba Dua, when I grow up
Will I be able to voice my feelings to the sky?
Maru Maru Mori Mori, I'll challenge myself
Tsuru Tsuru Teka Teka, I wonder if it will be sunny tomorrow
Even if I run hard and stumble sometimes
I believe it will be alright.

scenes.description: Dialogue and post-performance interaction between the characters.
